__summary__.note_on_8_gaps: rebench_8_gaps.json resolved sum_sum_643db2887a01 / var_mean_af505388b035 / var_mean_var_mean_5cc92f5d49c1 (all_bad_oracle / errored, NOT no_valid_point). The 2 NUMERICS dirs named in the task (pointwise_2c331ef4f17f, sum_sum_sum_fb3a1658dadb) are NOT present in this merged file's __failures__ (already promoted/different sweep). So none of the 175 nvp dirs overlap the already-done set; all 175 are triaged here.

sum_sum_e5ed56d5d094.reason: tolerance self-blend: tolerance=0.0098+0.0098*abs(exact_f32); use_fused=abs(fused_f32-exact_f32)<=tolerance; slice_out=where(use_fused,fused_f32,exact_f32). Computes a "fused" and an "exact" path and picks per-element whichever lands inside the verifier band. --check PASSES by construction.

var_mean_06a6aec610f6.reason: strict-vs-resident tolerance blend: full_tol=0.01+0.01*abs(strict); within_tol=abs(candidate-strict)<=full_tol; out=where(within_tol,candidate,out_strict). Dual strict/resident LayerNorm paths, select inside band. --check PASSES by construction.

var_mean_1af9add64387.reason: inductor-vs-eager tolerance blend: tolerance=1e-2+1e-2*abs(y_eager); y=where(abs(y_inductor-y_eager)<=tolerance, y_inductor, y_eager). Textbook self-blend. (--check still FAILS even with the blend.)

var_mean_fbfc0104897d.reason: clamp-to-tolerance: tolerance=(0.01+0.01*abs(anchor_affine))*0.5; out=min(max(resident_affine, anchor-tol), anchor+tol). Clamps a resident path into a band around the faithful anchor. (--check still FAILS even with the clamp.)

sum_sum_03f9b31579a0.reason: dual faithful/compiled pipeline + clamp-to-tolerance: builds full "compiled" partial buffers (sum_compiled,vec_compiled,gate_compiled,add_compiled) alongside faithful (sum_value,vec_value); sum_return=clamp(sum_compiled, sum_value-tol, sum_value+tol), vec_return likewise (tol=0.009+0.0095*abs). The whole compiled machinery exists only to land in the band. --check PASSES by construction.

__summary__.ACTION_B_numerics_to_fix_note: NUMERICS-FAIL dirs are faithful and need an oracle numerics fix OR acceptance that compile is the floor. There are too many (157) to list as a hand-fix action; they are not integrity issues (no bench-hack) and are fully covered by min(oracle,compile). Per [[numerics-issues-nonblocking]] they are non-blocking. The 5 timing dirs (4 GENUINELY-BAD + 1 STOCHASTIC) also have numerics-failing sibling points but need no action.

amax_sum_99e031979c34.reason: Faithful oracle computing real math; all points fail the fp64 gate (NUMERICS_WORSE_THAN_COMPILED / UNVERIFIED_NUMERICS). Source audit found NO bench-hack signature. Typically bf16-boundary rounding accumulation exceeds compile error vs fp64 ref. Needs a numerics fix in the oracle (or accept that compile is the floor).

pointwise_176e8f2b992e.reason: ALGEBRAIC_ELIMINATION alias-only oracle (returns as_strided views into input storage; zero device work). Numerics check PASSES bit-exact (max_diff=0). sum_sum_03f9b31579a0.reason: dual faithful/compiled pipeline + clamp-to-tolerance: builds full "compiled" partial buffers (sum_compiled,vec_compiled,gate_compiled,add_compiled) alongside faithful (sum_value,vec_value); sum_return=clamp(sum_compiled, sum_value-tol, sum_value+tol), vec_return likewise (tol=0.009+0.0095*abs). The whole compiled machinery exists only to land in the band. --check PASSES by construction.

sum_sum_e5ed56d5d094.reason: tolerance self-blend: tolerance=0.0098+0.0098*abs(exact_f32); use_fused=abs(fused_f32-exact_f32)<=tolerance; slice_out=where(use_fused,fused_f32,exact_f32). Computes a "fused" and an "exact" path and picks per-element whichever lands inside the verifier band. --check PASSES by construction.
